KAFKA_VERSION.description: Specific version of kafka to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

KAFKA_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install KAFKA. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

KAFKA_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for KAFKA to listen on

KAFKA_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for KAFKA to listen on

KAFKA_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for KAFKA to listen on
